name: MikroTik 1G/10G Active Direct Attach Cable 5m
title: MikroTik 1G/10G Active Direct Attach Cable 5m
short_description: SFP+ Active Optics direct attach cable, 5m, 10Gbps
description: SFP+ Active Optics direct attach cable, 5m, 10Gbps

detailed_description.heading: High-Speed Connectivity for 1G/10G Networks
detailed_description.text: The MikroTik S+AO0005 is a 5-meter Active Optical Direct Attach Cable (AOC) designed for fast, reliable, and cost-efficient connections between SFP and SFP+ devices. Supporting data rates of 1G and 10G, it provides an excellent solution for short links within server racks or between adjacent racks. This active optical cable is fully compatible with all MikroTik devices equipped with SFP/SFP+ ports, including the RB4011 series. Unlike passive DAC cables, the S+AO0005 guarantees stable performance even with devices that require active optical solutions. Its lightweight, flexible design makes installation easy, reducing cable clutter while maintaining high bandwidth and low latency. Designed for enterprises, data centers, and service providers looking to deploy high-speed networks quickly and efficiently, without separate transceivers.

detailed_description.heading: High-Speed Connectivity for 1G/10G Networks
detailed_description.text: The S+AO0005 offers an affordable alternative to traditional transceivers and fiber cables while delivering professional-grade performance. With its active optics technology, this 5-meter cable ensures optimal signal integrity over longer distances than passive DACs, making it ideal for demanding network environments. It supports seamless connectivity for a wide range of MikroTik switches and routers, helping enterprises scale their infrastructure efficiently. The SFP+ to SFP+ interface allows quick deployment without additional configuration, saving time during network expansion or maintenance. Its durable design ensures reliable performance even with constant handling in high-density server environments. Whether connecting core switches, aggregation devices, or high-speed storage systems, the S+AO0005 simplifies your setup and reduces overall costs, making it a smart choice for any modern IT infrastructure.
